text: Platform safety concerns emerged in media coverage, with reports highlighting identity theft risks and domestic abuse-related incidents on the platform C004. These reputational risks compound the regulatory and policy uncertainties facing short-term rental platforms. Market commentary indicates that while bookings and average daily rates (ADR) remained strong in Q2, growth has slowed in key markets amid broader economic headwinds C020 C015. Options market activity increased post-earnings, with analysts recommending collar strategies for risk management given the dramatic stock moves C009.
